title: GD656Peek
description: This MC mod adds the extremely smooth peeking effect from FPS games.
body:
This Minecraft mod, created by MinecraftGD656, provides a very smooth peeking effect, filling a significant gap in the gunfight experience within Minecraft.

# Basic Features
- Press Q or E to peek left or right. The keybinds can be fully customized by you.
- While peeking left or right, the player’s entity shifts 0.5 blocks in the corresponding direction.
- Uses [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) as the configuration interface dependency.

# Key Features
- The peeking animation is not limited to the vanilla 20‑tick rate, making it exceptionally smooth.
- The mod can be used on vanilla servers when installed on the client side, but **please ensure the server you join allows such modifications since it involves entity displacement**!
- Supports interrupting the animation.
- Allows movement while peeking.
_More features are in development..._


这款由MinecraftGD656制作的minecraft模组提供了非常流畅的侧头效果，弥补了minecraft枪战体验上的一个很大的空缺。

# 基础功能
- 按下Q或E可以向左或右侧头，当然按键可以由您自定义
- 左右探头时玩家实体会向对应方向偏移0.5格
- 使用[YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)作为前置配置页面

# 功能特色
- 侧头动画不仅限于原版的20tick，所以其非常流畅
- 客户端安装此模组后进入一个原版服务端服务器也可以使用，但因为涉及位移功能**请确保您安装此模组后加入的服务器允许这样的操作**！
- 支持打断动画
- 侧头时可以移动
_更多功能正在开发......_
